meta.title: carl — Roadmap
meta.blurb: A living plan for the game. We edit roadmap.json together: flip statuses, add items as we learn from playing. Keep it honest — if something's half-done or unproven, say so.
meta.vision: A classic fixed-path tower-defense game: enemies advance along set paths in waves, and you place & upgrade towers along them to stop them before they reach the goal. Built in Godot 4 (pivoted from an earlier 3D action prototype — same engine, rebuilt gameplay).
meta.note: Pre-prototype for the TD direction. Placeholder primitives only; reuse engine + tooling, rebuild the game.

sections.title: Next up
sections.desc: First TD prototype, roughly in build order.

sections.title: Later
sections.desc: Bigger TD bets, not yet scheduled.

sections.title: Ideas & open questions
sections.desc: Directions under consideration, not yet committed.

sections.title: Known issues / debt
sections.desc: Things that work but aren't right yet.

items.title: Perf: health-bar billboard cost (measured ~16ms -> ~3ms)
items.note: the one solid, repeatable win from the perf pass
children: Per-frame billboard did a get_camera_3d() lookup + look_at() per bar (~29 bars)
Now uses one shared facing basis (correct for the orthographic iso camera), refreshed only if the camera moves
Other perf changes shipped alongside are hygiene, not measurably proven — see debt

items.title: Debug/perf overlay (bottom-left, debug builds only)
items.note: for diagnosing combat lag ahead of a bug-fix-or-rewrite decision
children: FPS + CPU/physics frame time (ms), object/node/orphan counts, draw calls + primitives, live enemy/projectile counts
Visible only in debug builds (OS.is_debug_build); auto-hidden in release
Projectiles/bombs join a td_projectile group for the live count

items.title: Test suite (GUT) + visual checklist
items.note: a pre-PR gate; caught a real current_scene-null crash on first run
children: Vendored GUT addon; run_tests.sh runs it headlessly and exits non-zero on failure
21 coded tests: economy (build/upgrade/sell), targeting + line-of-sight, AoE falloff, frost slow, beam DPS, lead prediction, wave/lives flow
test/VISUAL_CHECKLIST.md: prose checks for visual/feel items, run agentically (launch + screenshot)
Hardened DamageNumber.popup and the bomb blast against a null current_scene

items.title: Combat feedback: health bars, damage numbers, click-off dismiss
children: Enemy health bars (green over red): appear on damage/heal, hold 2s, fade 0.5s; any change resets the timer; billboard to camera. Reusable component for anything with a Health node.
Floating damage numbers (white, rounded, drift up + fade); beam's fractional DPS accumulates so it pops whole numbers
Dismiss the tower upgrade panel by clicking empty space or pressing Esc; clicking another tower switches

items.title: Bomb tower (4th type) + projectile speed
items.note: predictive AoE mortar that can whiff on turns
children: Lobs a bomb in an arc to a FIXED ground point = target pos + velocity × flight-time (lead prediction)
Landing point locks at fire time, so enemies that turn off their line get missed — intended weakness
AoE on landing with linear falloff (full at center → 40% at the edge → nothing outside); expanding blast visual
Projectile speed is now a per-tier stat on all towers and rises with upgrades; cannon/frost shots travel faster, and bomb speed tightens the lead
Data-driven via TYPES (bomb flag + aoe); HUD button/panel handle it automatically

items.title: Beam tower (3rd type)
items.note: continuous-DPS contrast to cannon burst / frost slow
children: Fires a solid beam at one in-range, in-LOS target; applies low damage continuously (DPS)
Instant retarget to the next valid enemy; single-target
Data-driven via TYPES (beam flag + dps tiers); HUD build button + upgrade panel pick it up automatically

items.title: Spherical range + line-of-sight + range preview
items.note: first step toward maps with verticality
children: Towers target within a true 3D (spherical) radius
Line-of-sight: a tower only fires at enemies it can see — raycast from the muzzle vs. blocker geometry (layer 4)
Demo obstacle (a raised wall) added to the map to show LOS blocking in action
Translucent range sphere/dome preview: shown while hovering a free slot (for the chosen type) and on a selected tower
Reusable hover-preview sphere in the controller; per-tower sphere shown on select

items.title: First playable TD prototype (core loop)
items.note: 3D iso, fixed path, fixed buildable slots — the full minimal loop is playable
children: L-shaped path via Path3D → waypoints; ground, slots, red goal; lit iso scene (reused)
Enemies walk the path (reuse health.gd); leaking costs a life, kills pay currency
Click a green slot to build a tower (costs currency); towers auto-target the leader & fire
Homing projectile so shots connect with moving creeps
Waves (5), economy (kills + start bank), 20 lives, win/lose, R to restart
HUD: lives / currency / wave + Start-wave button + messages; new td_main.tscn is the main scene

items.title: 2nd tower type + tiered upgrades + sell
items.note: the variety that makes it a game, not a tech demo
children: Frost tower: lower damage, slows enemies on hit (blue tint + slow-factor/duration); enemies have a slow effect
Two build-type buttons (Cannon / Frost) with costs; pick one, then click a slot
Tiered upgrades (Lv 1→3) via a click-to-select tower panel; stats + rising cost, capped at max
Sell a placed tower for 50% of total spent; frees the slot
Data-driven tower stats (TYPES table) so balancing/new tiers is a one-place edit

items.title: Map verticality — multi-height terrain, elevated tower spots, paths that duck behind cover (LOS + spherical range groundwork is in)
children: create branching path logic in maps, so that enemies take random walks through maps, and towers have logic around which enemy to prioritize

items.title: Art pass — commit to a style once the loop is fun
items.note: we need to improve and clarify the state of a tower type when selected. Right now it's hard for the user to know their selection state in the game.
children: add a color ring around the selected tower type

items.title: Multiple maps / levels with different path layouts
items.note: this feature is dependent on some sort of outer menu. Possible that all menu sits inside a modal, but there may be a way to leave the main game state and navigate a menu environment.

items.title: More tower types (chain/lightning, support/buff aura)
children: tower that buffs attack speed for friendly towers within range
tower that heals other towers within range
tower that slows enemy attack speed within range
tower that slows enemy healing
tower that fires chain lightning which can spread to other enemies
tower that poisons enemies, applying damage over time
tower that casts a spell on enemies and makes them walk backwards

items.title: More enemy types (armored, flying, shielded, boss waves)
items.note: enemies should be able to be armored or shielded. armor displays in yellow and shield in blue. lightning effects have a damage bonus against shield, and poison has a damage buff against armor.

items.title: Meta-progression between runs (unlocks, persistent upgrades)
children: tower skins
achievement badges
stats

items.title: Main menu + pause + game-over/victory screens
Audio pass (music + SFX)
More combat juice — hit particles, screen shake, death effects, SFX
More enemy types: tower-debuff aura + fast exploder
items.note: shaking up the enemy types (round 2, building on the Grunt/Healer/Gunner system)
children: creep that casts a debuff aura on towers, slowing their fire rate
creep that moves quickly but has lower health, it also explodes on the base

items.title: Enemy type variety: Grunt / Healer / Gunner
items.note: Data-driven TDEnemy.TYPES table (mirrors the tower TYPES). Spawner mixes types by wave — Healers from wave 2, Gunners from wave 3.
children: Explosive Grunt (main creep): orange blast on reaching the goal; on death a small AoE damages nearby towers
Healer: green heal-pulse on an interval that restores HP to nearby living allies (skips itself), with an expanding aura visual
Gunner: carries a turret that shoots the nearest tower in range (yellow tracer), on a per-shot cooldown
Towers are now destructible — Health + take_damage + white hit-flash; at 0 HP they're destroyed, free their slot, and close the panel if selected
11 new GUT tests cover type stats, heal aura range/self-skip, gunner range, explosive death blast, and tower destruction/slot cleanup

items.title: Maze / free-placement TD twist
items.note: We chose classic fixed-path for the first prototype. If that proves fun, revisit letting players build the path with tower placement (Desktop TD / GemCraft style) for deeper strategy.

items.title: Deleted old action prototype scenes and scripts
items.note: Nothing salvaged — health.gd, health_bar.gd, damage_number.gd, debug_overlay.gd were already shared and kept. Everything else (player, boss, combat, enemy, hud, main, projectile, etc.) removed.

items.title: Perf: located and fixed combat hotspots via inline timing instrumentation
items.note: In-editor profiler didn't show function trees; used Time.get_ticks_usec() instrumentation instead. Engine cpu spikes eliminated, steady 60fps confirmed.
children: TDTower was the dominant cost — switched from _physics_process to _process (eliminated physics catchup bursts)
Retarget timer staggered at build time so all towers don't fire LOS raycasts on the same frame
Retarget interval increased 0.15s -> 0.25s; get_nodes_in_group replaced with TDEnemy.all_enemies static cache
LOS raycast exclusions added (self + enemy); enemy look_at throttled to once per waypoint segment
Shader pre-warm at game start: all scene types + all 4 projectile tint materials compiled before first wave
TDBomb blast ring mesh/material shared (was allocating new StandardMaterial3D per explosion)
TDProjectile changed from Area3D to Node3D (was running broadphase for nothing — no collision shape)

items.title: Perf: shader-compilation stutter fixed via pre-warm at game start
items.note: Confirmed real in-editor (300-480ms one-frame spikes). Fixed by instantiating all scene types + all 4 projectile tint materials off-screen for one frame before first wave.

items.title: Perf hygiene: throttled targeting, timer-driven flash, shared projectile materials
items.note: All three confirmed effective by inline timing measurements. Targeting throttle + staggered retarget timers eliminated per-frame raycast bursts; flash timer eliminated per-hit tweens; shared materials eliminated per-shot allocations.

items.title: Removed version.gd (action prototype overlay)
items.note: Deleted as part of old-scripts cleanup. TD game has no version overlay yet — add one when TD has its own build/versioning.

items.title: Perf: pool short-lived nodes (projectiles, damage numbers, blast rings) — reuse from a pool instead of instance/free per spawn. Reasonable hygiene, but NOT yet shown to be a bottleneck; confirm with the profiler before investing.
Early wave start: player can start the next wave 2s after the prior one begins
items.note: Replaced the alive-enemies gate with a 2s cooldown timer. _spawning no longer blocks the button — only the cooldown does.

items.title: Tower range preview when placing and selecting
items.note: Translucent sphere shown on slot hover (for chosen build type) and on selected tower. Implemented as part of the spherical range + LOS work.
